about.title: About Me
about.primary: I’m a Software Engineer who loves transforming ideas into reliable, scalable products. Over time, I’ve explored several technologies and found my passion in building high-performance systems and intuitive user experiences.
about.secondary: I’m proficient in JavaScript, C++, Rust, Node.js, and Java —and whenever possible, I love building projects with Node.js and modern frameworks like React.js and Next.js.

projects.title: GO-GO gadgets
projects.description: This is a redesigned website of a business that sells electronic products  by using the Bootstrap framework. The project demonstrates an enhanced user experience, improved aesthetics, and optimized performance on both desktop and mobile devices.

projects.title: Food menu
projects.description: A simple menu-style webpage using HTML and CSS. The project present a collection of food items and beverages, each accompanied by a description and price. The design is clean and visually appealing, making it easy for users to navigate and explore the menu offerings.

projects.title: Group project
projects.description: This project was collaborative, involving teamwork and communication skills. It helped me learn how to work effectively in a group setting and manage shared responsibilities.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: This is where you can describe about your contact. The more you describe about your contact, the more chances you have!
